title: Short title
doc_html:
PART XIX. POST-CONVICTION VETERANS MENTOR PROGRAM

§1199.21. Short title

            This Part may be referred to and may be cited as the "Post-Conviction Veterans Mentor Program".

            Acts 2018, No. 273, §1.
doc_text:
PART XIX.  POST-CONVICTION VETERANS MENTOR PROGRAM
§1199.21.  Short title
This Part may be referred to and may be cited as the "Post-Conviction Veterans
Mentor Program".
Acts 2018, No. 273, §1.
